project.name: SpineFoundation
project.description: Registry of datasets and how to fetch them

source.method: git clone https://github.com/spine-generic/data-multi-subject && cd data-multi-subject && git annex init && git annex get .
datalad install https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds005616/versions/1.1.2 && cd ds005616 && datalad get .
